---
title: "COMET Community Meeting 22 April"
date: 2026-04-22
author: "DataCite"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "Community meeting with roadmap updates, demonstrations, and discussion from the COMET team and members."
categories:
  - "Related Topic"
tags:
  - "COMET"
  - "DataCite"
  - "Community meeting"
proofread: false
image: "images/comet-community-meeting.png"
image-alt: "Registration page banner for the COMET Community Meeting on 22 April 2026"
image-caption: "Registration page banner for the COMET Community Meeting 22 April. Source: https://datacite.zoom.us/meeting/register/B5KGjV5QQQO2-p8WtSNzQw#/registration. Rights: DataCite/COMET."
toc: true
---

<!-- Sources: <https://datacite.zoom.us/meeting/register/B5KGjV5QQQO2-p8WtSNzQw#/registration>, <https://www.cometadata.org/> -->

::: {.callout-note}
This event has already taken place. Any registration information has been disabled and is shown for reference only.
:::

## Details

- Date: Wednesday, 22 April 2026
- Time: 17:00 (Zurich, CEST)
- Location: Online
- Registration: ~~`https://datacite.zoom.us/meeting/register/B5KGjV5QQQO2-p8WtSNzQw#/registration`~~
- Event page: <https://www.cometadata.org/>

## About

The COMET Community Meeting includes updates from the COMET team, opportunities to share feedback on the roadmap, demonstrations, and presentations by COMET community members.

The session is designed as an open community forum for people interested in COMET developments and implementation practice.
